query: show me our bad actor assets
expected_behavior: Surfaces the 'bad actor' ambiguity BEFORE answering — asks which of the four valid framings the user means: top-N by failure count, by total downtime, by repair cost, or by criticality-weighted failure count
Does not silently pick one framing and return a final ranking
If the user picks the repair-cost framing, defers cost methodology to maximo-maintenance-cost
